message:
test(robot): add unit tests for trends and errors modules

Cover pure-logic functions in trends.go (boundary classification,
concurrent access, nil-value handling, per-pane tracking) and
errors.go (pattern matching across Python/Go/JS/Rust/generic errors,
exit codes, agent errors, parse helpers, agent type mapping).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
